patches.hypothesis: Refined the patch to handle general cases and avoid overfitting by fixing the actual root cause of the issue
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the incorrect handling of the input array, which can have a length less than 3, leading to an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException. The fix involves adding a null check for the input array and handling the case where the input array is null.

patches.hypothesis: The method was incorrectly assuming that the input data is always valid and contained the expected values, causing an array index out of bounds exception when the input data was invalid.
